paragraph: Life limitless flows through me to complete its perfect work. The power which guides all things finds in me an open channel of expression. Receiving that power freely, I freely give to all things and creatures in the field of existence surrounding me.
affirmation: THROUGH ME LIFE ETERNAL TRANSFORMS ALL THINGS INTO ITS LIKENESS.

paragraph: The law of truth is written in my heart; all my members are ruled by it. Through my subconsciousness, I am united to the Source of all wisdom, and its light banishes every shadow of ignorance and fear. I share the perfect memory of the Universal Mind, and have free access to its treasures of knowledge and wisdom.
affirmation: THE PEACE OF THE ETERNAL, AND THE LIGHT OF ITS PRESENCE, ARE WITH ME NOW.

paragraph: The Mind that frames the worlds is ruler of my thoughts; I listen for its instruction. Through the One Life sets its house in order, and makes known the hidden meaning of its way and works. It arms me against all appearances of hostility, and by its revelation of truth I meet and solve the problems of this day.
affirmation: DIVINE REASON GUIDES MY THOUGHT AND DIRECTS MY ACTION, THROUGH THE INSTRUCTION OF THE VOICE OF INTUITION.

paragraph: The healing radiance of the One Life descends upon me; it fills the field of my whole personal existence with heavenly influences of strength and peace. All the force of my being is rightly disposed, for I yield myself utterly to the sure guidance of the One Will which governs all things in their true relationships and proportions, and my words, expressing this clear vision, are words of power.
affirmation: THIS DAY I THINK AND ACT WITH TRUE DISCRIMINATION, FOR MY PERSONALITY IS A VEHICLE FOR THE LORD OF LIFE.

paragraph: My strength is established, and I rejoice, for I am one with the single Source of all power. Nothing is, or can be, my antagonist, for I am a perfectly responsive instrument through which the Primal Will finds free expression. The subtle vibrations of cosmic energy work together for my liberation, and even now the Hand of the Eternal leads me step by step along the way to freedom.
affirmation: EVERY FORCE IN THE UNIVERSE IS AN OBEDIENT SERVANT OF THE ONE IDENTITY MY OWN TRUE SELF.

paragraph: One power spins electrons round the nucleus of an atom, whirls planets round suns, expresses itself in all cycles of universal activity, yet remains ever itself, and perpetually maintains its equilibrium. The sum-total of the revolutions of the great universe, including all activities, is inseparable from the successive transformations of energy which make up my life history. Every detail of my daily experience is some part of a cosmic cycle of adjustment and transformation.
affirmation: THE WHIRLING FORCE WHICH MOVES THE WORLDS IS THE MOTIVE POWER IN ALL MY PERSONAL ACTIVITIES, AND ADJUSTS THEM ALL TO RIGHT USES.

paragraph: I do nothing of myself. These thoughts and words and deeds are but ripening of the seeds of past activities. Every phase of my personal existence depends utterly on the motion of the One Life. Therefore I am free from fate, free from accident, free even from death, since what I truly am can suffer neither decay nor change. By knowledge of truth I reverse all former pain bearing errors. The darkness of ignorance passes away, and the light of a new day dawns in my heart.
affirmation: I SUSPEND THE ERROR OF PERSONAL ACTION, AND THUS DISSOLVE THE LIE OF SEPARATION.

paragraph: Recognizing every detail of my life experience to be the operation of the One Life, I perceive that every appearance of adversity must be, in truth, a mask worn by that same One Life, to test my power to know it, even through the most forbidding veils. Like a wise teacher, the One Life sets me problems, that in the solutions I may receive renewed proofs that nothing whatever may be excluded from the perfect order of the Great Plan.
affirmation: THAT WHICH WAS AND IS AND WILL BE IS THE ONLY REALITY. THIS DAY I SEE THE FACE OF THE BELOVED BEHIND EVERY MASK OF ADVERSITY.

paragraph: I am awakened from the nightmare of delusion, and now the truth that God, Man and Universe are but three names for the One Identity, is clear to me. Fear makes some men build them prisons which they call places of safety, but he who has seen the vision of the Beloved has in his heart no room for fear.
affirmation: I NEED NO BARRIERS OF PROTECTION, FOR THE LIFE OF ALL CREATURES IS MY TRUEST FRIEND.

paragraph: My feet are set upon the path of liberation, which shall lead me far from the limits of the world of sense illusion. I follow the Way of Return, as a child turns its face homeward at the end of the day. I do not see the end of the road, for it goes beyond the boundaries of my present vision, but I know the sun shines there, and that joy is there, for I have heard the messages of encouragement sent back by those who have gone on ahead.
affirmation: MY EYES ARE TURNED TO THE HEIGHTS. I PRESS ON TOWARD THE NEW LIFE OF A NEW DAY.

paragraph: The Life of the heavens is manifested in me, here on earth. The fire of right knowledge burns away the bonds of illusion, and the light of right understanding transforms the face of the world. Through me the Perpetual Intelligence which governs all things administers its Perfect Law.
affirmation: MINE IS THE LIFE ETERNAL, TREADING THE JOYOUS MEASURE OF THE DANCE OF MANIFESTATION.

paragraph: This 'self consciousness' of mine is the means whereby the cultural power of the One Life may be directed to the field of subconscious activity. Its primary function is that of alert attention. As I watch closely the sequence of this day's events, their meaning will be transmitted to my subconsciousness, there to germinate in forms of right knowledge and right desire.
affirmation: TODAY I AM ON THE ALERT.

paragraph: My personal world is as I see it. If the images rising from my subconsciousness are consequences of my faulty perceptions of other days, the new knowledge I have gained will help me detect and destroy them. By being thus ever on the watch, I shall set my world in order. Thus, too, shall I make ready to hear the Voice of Intuition, which will enable me to solve my problems when I am face to face with appearances of disorder which my reasoning will not set straight.
affirmation: I SEE THINGS AS THEY ARE.

paragraph: Consciousness and subconsciousness work together in my life, as harmoniously balanced counterparts. I yield my whole personality to the directive and protective influx of the One Life. The mighty forces of vibration below the level of my self consciousness are purified and adjusted by the Master Power of which I am a receptive vehicle.
affirmation: HARMONY, PEACE AND STRENGTH ARE MINE.

paragraph: The will of the Eternal guides me to perfect union with the One Identity. Every detail of my daily experience is in truth a revelation of that Will through the cycles of its expression. What I do now is inseparable from the cosmic sequences of manifestation which establish the reign of justice throughout creation.
affirmation: THE ONE POWER, MANIFESTING THE PERFECT ORDER OF THE UNIVERSE, KEEPS ME POISED THROUGH ALL CHANGES.

paragraph: Every detail of my personal activity is really some part of the operation of the cosmic life. Today I reap the fruit of thoughts and words and deeds of other days, and pass on to better things. I am guided, moment by moment, by the overshadowing presence of the One Identity.
affirmation: MY PERSONALITY DOES NOTHING OF ITSELF, PASSING FROM STAGE TO STAGE OF ITS GROWTH, BY THE POWER OF THE ONE LIFE, TOWARD THE GOAL OF FREEDOM.

paragraph: Every appearance of adversity and antagonism is an evidence of faulty vision. Let me be freed today from the delusion of separateness, and let my eyes be opened to the white splendor of the One Life.
affirmation: I REJOICE IN MY PROBLEMS, FOR THEY STIMULATE MY CONSCIOUSNESS TO OVERCOME ERROR, THAT I MAY SEE THE BEAUTY OF THE DIVINE PERFECTION.

paragraph: Every cell in my body is animated by the cosmic urge to freedom. I turn my back upon the limitations of the past, and face courageously toward the new way which opens before me.
affirmation: MY VERY FLESH IS THE SEED GROUND FOR A NEW LIFE, FREE FROM BONDAGE TO TIME AND SPACE.

paragraph: I am not deceived by the manifold illusions of sensation. I remember continually that these appearances are but reflections of a Single Reality. My subconsciousness, by its power of deductive reasoning, develops the seed of right observation into a rich harvest of wisdom.
affirmation: ALERT AND CONCENTRATED, I SEE CLEARLY, MAKE CLEAR AND DEFINITE MEMORY RECORDS OF EXPERIENCE, AND THUS COLLECT MATERIAL FOR THE GROWTH OF TRUE UNDERSTANDING.

paragraph: The empire of the Universal Order includes the little province of my personal existence. All experience teaches me the perfection of the Great Plan. Consciously and subconsciously, I respond to the perfect Wisdom which rules all creation.
affirmation: THROUGH ME THE ONE LIFE ESTABLISHES ORDER, REVEALS THE SIGNIFICANCE OF EVERY PHASE OF MANIFESTATION, RIGHTLY DISPOSES ALL THINGS.

paragraph: The One Life lives through me. Its vital fire pervades my being. Its unfailing Will sustains me continually.
affirmation: THE MASTER PRINCIPLE OF THE UNIVERSE, DWELLING IN MY HEART, PURIFIES AND PERFECTS ME, AND LEADS ME TO THE HEIGHTS OF UNION WITH ITSELF.

paragraph: The revolutions of circumstances in the outer world are manifestations of the One Power seated in my heart. That Power maintains its perfect equilibrium through all these sequences of cause and effect. My personal activities have no existence apart from that Power.
affirmation: THE WHEEL OF LIFE REVOLVES ROUND THE CENTER OF PURE SPIRIT, PRESENT EVERYWHERE, AND THEREFORE CENTERED IN MY HEART. THIS UNMOVED MOVER OF ALL CREATION IS MY UNFAILING STAY.

paragraph: Out of the darkness of the unknown comes the power which sets me free. The Way of Liberation stands open and free. I face this day's tests with joyful heart.
affirmation: AS I DIE TO THE OLD PERSONALITY, FULL OF DELUSION, AND FACE THE UNKNOWN FUTURE BRAVELY, CONFIDENT OF SUPPLY FOR EVERY NEED, MY FEARS DISSOLVE IN THE CLEAR SUNLIGHT OF RIGHT UNDERSTANDING.

paragraph: Let others imprison themselves in their towers of false knowledge. I will be free! Let others dread the workings of our Mother Nature. I will love all her ways! Let others be servants of the body which they hate, because they are its slaves. I will make it my servant and love it for its faithfulness in responding to my commands!
